title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
body_text: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. The JSON MUST validate against this Pydantic JSON Schema for SummarizedContent: { "description": "Class for a single class label summary and description.", "properties": { "summary": { "title": "Summary", "type": "string" }, "description": { "title": "Description", "type": "string" } }, "required": [ "summary", "description" ], "title": "SummarizedContent", "type": "object" } System instructions from Cognee: You are a top-tier summarization engine. Your task is to summarize text and make it versatile. Be brief and concise, but keep the important information and the subject. Use synonim words where possible in order to change the wording but keep the meaning. Input text: output/cognee_qwen_embedding_sample_bundle/edges.jsonl {"summary":"A JSONL edge list describing the knowledge graph for the paper \"Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting,\" linking the paper, claims, evidence, methods, tasks, limitations, and performance results.","description":"The file records graph relationships around a research paper on Gaussian Splatting for 3D shape reconstruction and novel vie

turns.text: {"summary":"A JSONL edge list describing the knowledge graph for the paper \"Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting,\" linking the paper, claims, evidence, methods, tasks, limitations, and performance results.","description":"The file records graph relationships around a research paper on Gaussian Splatting for 3D shape reconstruction and novel view synthesis. It connects the paper to concepts such as stochastic solids, volumetric rendering, and depth maps, captures a limitation of prior methods with low multi-view consistency and floaters, and includes evidence-backed claims that the proposed approach achieves strong reconstruction performance on public datasets."}
